message:
refactor(test): consolidate send redaction tests into single test function

Merges TestSendRealSession_RedactMode and TestSendRealSession_BlockMode
into TestSendRealSession as additional assertions within the same tmux
session. This eliminates duplicate session setup/teardown overhead and
reduces CI time.

Changes:
- Add redact mode test within existing TestSendRealSession after initial
  prompt verification
- Add block mode test as final assertion in same session
- Remove separate test functions that each spawned their own session
- Reuse same agentPane reference for all assertions

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
